description: Reduce the API gap between the RedisVL Python embeddings cache and the .NET EmbeddingsCache so .NET supports the same cache identity, richer entry payloads, and core lifecycle operations with a .NET-native surface.

userStories.title: Align cache identity with Python embeddings cache
userStories.description: As a .NET developer, I want EmbeddingsCache keys to incorporate model identity in addition to input content so that cached embeddings do not collide across embedding models.
acceptanceCriteria: Add API support for model-aware cache identity on EmbeddingsCache writes and lookups
Generate distinct Redis keys for the same input when different model names are provided
Preserve a clear migration or compatibility story for existing input-only cache usage
Add unit tests covering same-input different-model key generation and lookup behavior
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Store and return rich cache entries
userStories.description: As a .NET developer, I want EmbeddingsCache to store and return the same core entry fields as Python so that cache consumers can inspect more than just the raw embedding vector.
acceptanceCriteria: Store hash fields for input content, model name, embedding payload, and optional metadata
Add a public .NET result model for cache entry reads instead of returning only float arrays
Lookup APIs return null for misses and a populated entry model for hits
Add unit tests covering round-trip persistence of entry fields and metadata
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Align single-entry read and write API surface
userStories.description: As a .NET developer, I want the primary read and write methods to mirror the Python embeddings cache semantics so that moving between the two libraries requires minimal translation.
acceptanceCriteria: Add .NET read and write overloads that accept input content, model name, embedding, and optional metadata
Return the Redis cache key from write operations or expose an equivalent first-class result that includes it
Support per-call TTL override in addition to cache-level defaults
Document the intended sync and async method mapping from Python to .NET
Add unit tests for cache-level TTL and per-call TTL precedence
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add key-based and existence APIs
userStories.description: As a .NET developer, I want key-based retrieval and existence checks so that the .NET cache supports the same operational workflows as the Python cache.
acceptanceCriteria: Add key-based read APIs for retrieving cache entries directly by Redis key
Add existence-check APIs for content plus model lookups and for direct key checks
Add unit tests for hit and miss behavior across the new APIs
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add delete APIs for embeddings cache entries
userStories.description: As a .NET developer, I want to delete cache entries by semantic lookup inputs or direct Redis key so that .NET supports the same cache lifecycle controls as Python.
acceptanceCriteria: Add delete APIs for content plus model identity
Add delete APIs for direct Redis keys
Return explicit success or deletion-count information from delete operations
Add unit tests covering delete hits, misses, and repeated deletes
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add batch embeddings cache operations
userStories.description: As a .NET developer, I want batch get, set, existence, and delete operations so that high-volume cache workflows can be expressed similarly to the Python library.
acceptanceCriteria: Add batch write APIs for multiple embeddings cache entries
Add batch read APIs for semantic lookups and direct Redis keys
Add batch existence and delete APIs
Document ordering and partial-hit behavior for batch results
Add unit tests for mixed hit and miss batch scenarios
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Document and example the Python-parity embeddings cache workflow
userStories.description: As a .NET developer, I want docs and examples that explain the aligned EmbeddingsCache API so that I can translate Python RedisVL cache usage into .NET with minimal ambiguity.
acceptanceCriteria: Update EmbeddingsCache docs to describe model-aware keys, rich entry payloads, TTL behavior, and lifecycle operations
Update the EmbeddingsCache example to demonstrate the aligned API shape
Add a concise parity table or mapping guide between Python and .NET embeddings cache methods
Typecheck passes
